name: Documentation change
about: Report a gap, contradiction, or error in the documentation

labels: [ documentation ]

<!-- The documentation under docs/ is the source of truth. This issue flags where it is wrong, unclear, or inconsistent. -->

## Which document

<!-- Path to the document that is inconsistent or incomplete. -->

## The gap or contradiction

<!-- What is missing, unclear, or in conflict with another document. -->

## Owning document

<!-- Which document owns the decision at issue — i.e. where the fix belongs. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo / formatting (no change in meaning)
- [ ] Traceability fix (cross-reference, link, or anchor)
- [ ] Meaning change (alters what a document decides — needs review)

## Downstream impact

<!-- Do any other documents depend on this and also need updating? -->
